languages.bonus_per_int: 1 additional language per INT point above 12

class_options.dual_class_note: Humans are the only race that can dual-class. Must have 15+ in prime requisite of original class and 17+ in prime requisite of new class.

level_limits.note: Humans have no level limits in any class.

dual_class.description: Humans may change from one class to another. They must have 15+ in the prime requisite of the original class and 17+ in the prime requisite of the new class. They cannot use abilities of the old class until the new class exceeds the former class's level.

racial_notes: Humans are the most common race and the standard by which others are measured. They have no special abilities but also no restrictions.
